salaryCatalogReview.reason: salary_components exposes compensation policy fields including defaultValue, formulaExpression, calculationType, isTaxable, and isSscApplicable; therefore /api/salary-components/catalog and /api/salary-components are limited to hradmin/payrolladmin.
